title: inula istriaca
intro: Inula istriaca, also known as Golden Samos, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Inula istriaca is known to have numerous health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
